action.reasoning: Starting fresh. Need to build CIFAR-100N classifier with ~40% label noise. Strategy: (1) Use pretrained ConvNeXt-tiny for strong features, (2) Apply label smoothing + mixup for noise robustness, (3) Use cleanlab to identify/remove noisy labels. First iteration: train for 10 epochs to get baseline and measure timing.
